title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIIT Hyderabad - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIIT Hyderabad - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!
